name: frontend-code-review
description: Frontend-focused code review guidance for UI, component, styling, interaction, accessibility, and responsive behavior changes.

interface.shortDescription: Review frontend changes for UI, behavior, and accessibility risks
interface.longDescription: Frontend-focused review guidance for component changes, CSS/layout work, responsive behavior, accessibility, client-side interactions, and visual QA.
defaultPrompt: Audit this UI implementation for behavior, accessibility, and responsive issues.
